name: 36" x 30" Golden Forest Framed Wall Art: Modern Decor, MDF & Glass - Threshold™ designed w/Studio McGee
description: The 36" x 30" Golden Forest Framed Wall Art by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee is a digital print featuring a sultry scenery of a gold forest set against a neutral backdrop. The brown frame comes with a glass case and D ring mount for easy hanging. The horizontal orientation of the canvas makes it a great centerpiece. Boost the visual appeal of your room with this golden forest framed canvas from Threshold, a collaborative creation with Studio McGee.
